cards.title: Abstraction
cards.governance_note: Treat abstraction as selective representation, not neutral simplification.

cards.title: Representation
cards.governance_note: Document what the representation preserves, suppresses, and enables.

cards.title: Scope
cards.governance_note: Define where the abstraction is valid and where it should not be reused.

cards.title: Abstraction Risk
cards.governance_note: Watch for context loss, false precision, hidden assumptions, proxy confusion, and responsibility hiding.
